headlines.headline: Ervan Capital announces breakthrough in renewable storage

sentiment.reasoning: A breakthrough in renewable storage technology suggests significant long-term competitive advantage, though immediate commercialization timelines remain vague.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
